name: Chonky
notes: Fort Irongrad Tank Plant exclusive (not shared with Frostworks) — the roster's tankiest unit: highest HP of any troop plus a flat 8 armor (stacks with, doesn't replace, damageReceivedModifiers, per schema), at the cost of very short range and the slowest heavy tank. Bonus vs. Infantry (1.5x) reflects its role crushing infantry lines up close rather than dueling other tanks at range.
